vision_description: The image shows a table detailing the function of LEDs lit on a control panel. It appears to be a panel schedule or similar documentation for a system with multiple gondolas (Gondola 1, 2, and 3). The table lists modules (X4.3, X4.4, X5.1, X5.2, X5.3, X5.4), individual LEDs, their functions, and their states (e.g., lit or not assigned).
